actionItems.text: Send Zoom details to Calvin Li for tomorrow's CKGSB & Goldman Sachs collaboration call.
actionItems.detail: Calvin Li sent a gentle reminder asking for the Zoom details and is looking forward to speaking tomorrow. Make sure the Zoom link and calendar invite are sent or confirmed.

actionItems.text: Manage Flow more closely on SEM/SEO: feed them the 2026 strategic plan and key themes.
actionItems.detail: Ira asked that Flow be managed more closely and proactively. First step is to share the strategic plan (including 2026 key themes) so Flow can align SEM/SEO work.

actionItems.text: Request regular, clear SEM/SEO reports from Flow after each program.
actionItems.detail: In the SEM/SEO thread, Ira asked that Flow provide regular reporting after each program so CKGSB has visibility on performance.

actionItems.text: Ask Flow for suggestions on optimizing SEM/SEO strategy for LLM and new search tools.
actionItems.detail: Joseph's reply to Ira commits to asking Flow for ideas on how to optimize the strategy given LLMs and evolving search behaviour.

actionItems.text: Review all keywords and ad text in the global SEM/SEO campaign with Flow.
actionItems.detail: Joseph agreed in email to review all keywords and ad text of the global campaign, as part of tightening Flow's management.

actionItems.text: Inform Flow or mark yourself in the Lead Management System for program enrollments that came via SEM/SEO campaigns.
actionItems.detail: Ira asked that Flow be informed, or that Joseph mark himself in the backend, when students enroll via SEM/SEO campaigns so results are traceable.

actionItems.text: Review Professor Wang Neng's article draft and send consolidated feedback to Ira.
actionItems.detail: Ira asked Joseph and Julie to share their thoughts on Professor Wang Neng's article so she can send it back to him for confirmation.

decisions.text: CKGSB will manage Flow more proactively on SEM/SEO, including sharing the 2026 strategic plan and requesting regular reports.
decisions.detail: In the SEM/SEO email exchange, Ira set expectations that Flow should be managed more closely. Joseph agreed to share the strategic plan and ask for ongoing reporting, signalling a decision to treat Flow as a partner that is actively steered rather than passively briefed.
